Notice Of Motin To Compel Pltf Yuval Erlich To (1) Respond To The First Set Of Special Interrogatories (2) Further Respond To The First Set Of Oform Interrogatories; To Compel Tamar Herzog To Further Respond To The First Set Of Form Interogatories And Special Interrogatories; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltfs And Their Attorneys Of Record
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Marvin K. Anderson, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Pacific Bell Telephone Company
Claude A. Wyle, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Yuval Erlich

After hearing, tentative ruling is vacated. 1) defendant Pacific Bell Telephone's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories (set #1, Yuval Erlich).
2) defendant's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories (set #1, Yuval Erlich).
3) defendant's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories (set #1, Tamar Herzog).
Are taken off calendar per request of the moving party. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
